hooks.command: graphify hook status || echo 'graphify MCP unreachable - run: uv tool install --editable tools/vendor/graphify-local --force && graphify hook install'

powershell -NoProfile -NonInteractive -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$in=[Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); try { $d=$in | ConvertFrom-Json -ErrorAction Stop } catch { exit 0 }; $cmd=''; if ($null -ne $d.tool_input -and $null -ne $d.tool_input.command) { $cmd=[string]$d.tool_input.command } elseif ($null -ne $d.command) { $cmd=[string]$d.command }; if ($cmd -match '\b(grep|rg|ripgrep|find|fd|ack|ag)\b' -and (Test-Path 'graphify-out/graph.json')) { @{hookSpecificOutput=@{hookEventName='PreToolUse'; additionalContext='graphify: Knowledge graph exists. Read graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md for god nodes and community structure before searching raw files.'}} | ConvertTo-Json -Compress -Depth 5 }; exit 0"
